description: Legal document. In Arabic script. Perhaps a deed of sale. Mentions (l. 6) the mound known as Kawm Dīnār in the vicinity of Birkat Ramīs ("the pool of Ramīs"), which was situated in the Ḥamrāʾ district in the north of Fustat. See Khan, ALAD, 175–76. (Information from Baker/Polliack catalogue.) Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
